item.description:
👤 Owner: OpenMOSS

📝 Repository: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS-Nano

📄 Descrizione: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team.
